title: Lilavati Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Lilavati Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Lilavati Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lilavati Hospital:
Lilavati Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lilavati Hospital!
